lines.english: He comes to dwell in the home of his own inner being. ||3||
He cannot be fooled; He is the Truest of the True.
In the Court of the True Lord, he obtains true glory.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰਿ ਸਭਿ ਭੂਲਹਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: hor sabh bhooleh doojai pat khoe |
lines.english: All others are deluded; in duality, they lose their honor.
So serve the True Lord, through the True Bani of His Word.
O Nanak, through the Naam, merge in the True Lord. ||4||9||
Basant, Third Mehl:
In attachment to Maya, they suffer in terrible pain.
Without the grace of good karma, all are deluded by doubt.
That humble being who obeys the Hukam of the Lord's Command is accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਸਟਾ ਕਾ ਕੀੜਾ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bisattaa kaa keerraa bisattaa maeh samaaee |1|
lines.english: They are like maggots in manure, rotting away in manure. ||1||
The blind, self-willed manmukhs find no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਜਿਨੑਾ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saach rate jinaa dhur likh paaeaa |
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny are imbued with the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad naam neesaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he is blessed with the insignia and the banner of the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam sadaa man bhaaeaa |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord is forever pleasing to their minds.
Only the Naam, the Name of the Lord, can save the world.
Through it, one's light merges into the Light. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਬਾਣੀ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur kee baanee sadaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: Through the Bani, the Word of the True Guru, eternal peace is found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਲੈ ਪਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: poore gur te naam palai paaee |3|
lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, the Naam is obtained. ||3||
By Guru's Grace, one comes to love the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naamai mukat kinai na paaee |
lines.english: Without the Naam, no one obtains liberation.
He alone understands, whom the Lord Himself causes to understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਇਕੁ ਜਾਤਾ ਸੇ ਜਨ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: jin ik jaataa se jan paravaan |
lines.english: Those humble beings who know the One Lord are approved and accepted.
Serving the True Guru, the Naam is implanted within.
O Nanak, imbued with the Naam, they go to the Lord's Court with His banner and insignia. ||4||10||
Granting His Grace, the Lord leads the mortal to meet the True Guru.
Basant, Third Mehl:
His intellect becomes steady and stable, and his mind is strengthened forever.
The Lord Himself comes to abide in his mind.
He sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the Ocean of Virtue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਭੇਖ ਕਰਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bahu bhekh kareh man saant na hoe |
lines.english: They wear all sorts of religious robes, but their minds are not at peace.
Those who forget the Naam, the Name of the Lord - those mortals die eating poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਿਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: brithaa janam fir aaveh jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Their lives are wasted uselessly, and they continue coming and going in reincarnation. ||1||Pause||
They bring their distractible minds back home. ||2||
But those who realize the Word of the Shabad, are blessed by great good fortune.
In great egotism, they lose their honor.
Within the home of the inner self is the inaccessible and infinite substance.
Those who find it, by following the Guru's Teachings, contemplate the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap kare kichh karan na jaae |
lines.english: God Himself does everything; no one can do anything at all by himself.
are forever dyed in the color of the Lord's Love; they are absorbed in the Truth. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਈ ਘਰ ਹੀ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam nav nidh paaee ghar hee maeh |
lines.english: Those who obtain the nine treasures of the Naam within the home of their own inner being,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਨੇੜੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis te nerrai naahee ko door |
lines.english: All are near Him; no one is far away from Him.
O Nanak, the Naam is permeating and pervading everywhere. ||4||11||
When God so wills, He merges the mortal into Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟ ਕੋਟੰਤਰ ਕੇ ਪਾਪ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kott kottantar ke paap jal jaeh |
lines.english: The sins of millions upon millions of lifetimes shall be burnt away.
Basant, Third Mehl:
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, remember the Lord with love,
and you shall remain satisfied by the sublime essence of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਦਾਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: har kee daat har jeeo jaanai |
lines.english: The Dear Lord Himself knows His own bountiful blessings.
Remaining dead while yet alive, you shall be absorbed in the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣਦਾਤਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਖਾਣੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad ihu man mauliaa har gunadaataa naam vakhaanai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This mind blossoms forth in the Guru's Shabad, chanting the Name of the Lord, the Giver of virtue. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਸੰਜਮਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bahu sanjam saant na paavai koe |
lines.english: Tranquility is not found by strict self-discipline.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਗਵੈ ਵੇਸਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhagavai ves bhram mukat na hoe |
lines.english: No one is liberated by wandering around in saffron-colored robes.
But by following the Guru's Teachings, one is blessed to receive the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
In this Dark Age of Kali Yuga, glorious greatness comes through the Lord's Name.
By great good fortune, one finds the Lord. ||2||
